prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Mercedes-AMG M178 4.0L V8 Biturbo (engine code: M178 LS2)** with a **Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbocharger** (86mm compressor wheel, 106mm turbine wheel) and **Precision Turbo & Engine 7675 CEA ball-bearing turbo** for compound setup, paired with a **Tial MV-R 60mm wastegate** and **Tial Q 50mm BOV** for boost control. Custom **ECU remap via AEM Infinity 7** with **Motec PDM15** power distribution module for precise fuel and ignition mapping, targeting **850whp on E85** with **ID1000x injectors** and **Radium Engineering fuel surge tank** for high-G fuel delivery.

Full **HRE FF01 20x10.5 ET25 (front) and 21x12.5 ET35 (rear) forged wheels** wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30/20 front, 325/25/21 rear)** for optimal grip. **AP Racing RSC1000 6-piston front and 4-piston rear brake calipers** with **380mm (front) and 355mm (rear) two-piece carbon-ceramic rotors** for extreme stopping power. **Ohlins TTX40 coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping** and **EDAG-specific **polyurethane bushings** (replacing all OEM rubber) for razor-sharp chassis response.

Custom **3.5-inch titanium exhaust system** with **Akrapović Racing headers** (equal-length 4-2-1 design) and **Burns Stainless 304L merge collectors**, terminating in a **REMUS titanium quad-tip muffler**. **PWR radiator with dual SPAL 16-inch fans** and **Setrab 50-row oil cooler** to maintain optimal temps under extreme loads. **Holinger RD6 sequential gearbox** with **PPG straight-cut gears** and **Tilton triple-plate carbon clutch** for lightning-fast shifts.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit** (EDAG-specific CFRP panels) with **custom 3D-printed ABS front splitter** and **carbon fiber rear diffuser** (integrated **Aeromotions active rear wing** with **3-position adjustability**). **Full carbon fiber hood** (EDAG OEM-style with **functional NACA ducts**) and **carbon fiber side skirts** with **integrated LED turn signals** (Lux H8 V4). **Custom **anodized gold** **HRE FF01 wheels** with **EDAG-branded center caps** and **Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires** (stretched for aggressive fitment).

**Full interior overhaul with **Recaro SPG XL Kevlar seats** (EDAG-logo embroidery) and **Schroth 6-point harnesses**. **MOMO Prototipo steering wheel** (flat-bottom, Alcantara-wrapped) with **Motec C127 dash display** and **custom **carbon fiber door cards** (integrated **Brembo GT-R-style door pulls**). **Roll cage by **Custom Cages UK** (T45 steel, **EDAG-specific design** with **integrated fire suppression system** by **Life Racing**).

**Custom **matte **Aeroflake **Lime Green** wrap** (EDAG-exclusive color) with **gloss black **carbon fiber accents** (roof, mirrors, diffuser). **LED headlight upgrade** (Osram Night Breaker Laser) with **custom **Hella Dynamic Cornering** system. **Carbon fiber side mirrors** (EDAG OEM-style, **heated with **auto-dimming** function). **Custom **underglow kit** by **Oracle Lighting** (RGBW, **EDAG-specific **programmable patterns**).
